title: Sweet Potato Bake
description: A delicious sweet potato bake with a smoky twist, perfect for a side dish or main course.

ingredients.name: Smoky Japanese BBQ Sauce
ingredients.notes: or substitute with similar sweet and smoky sauce

instructions: Boil the sweet potatoes until tender, then drain and let cool.
In a bowl, mix together the BBQ sauce and Parmesan cheese.
Add the breadcrumbs and beaten egg to the bowl and mix well.
Spoon the sweet potatoes into a greased baking dish.
Pour the BBQ sauce mixture over the sweet potatoes and coat evenly.
Dot the top with melted butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
